channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Utes drop first home game to St. Mary's, 72-63
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Runnin' Utes had won its first six home games by an average margin of 32 points. But they hadn't played a team as talented as Saint Mary's. The Gaels came into the Huntsman Center Saturday, and led by Paulius Murauskas, beat the utes, 72-63.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Oregon, Penn State amass 55 points to set Big Ten title game 1st-half scoring record
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — Oregon and Penn State piled up seven touchdowns, 537 yards, 28 first downs and 55 points in the Big Ten title game Saturday night. That was in the first half. The top-ranked Ducks headed into halftime with a 31-24 lead.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Wizards overcome career-high 56 by Jokic, snap 16-game skid with 122-113 win over the Nuggets
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Jordan Poole scored 39 points, and the Washington Wizards overcame a career-high 56 by Nikola Jokic to beat the Denver Nuggets 122-113 on Saturday night and snap their 16-game losing streak.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: LA Galaxy strike early, hold off New York Red Bulls 2-1 to win their record 6th MLS Cup championship
item.description: CARSON, Calif. (AP) — The LA Galaxy finished 26th in the 29-team Major League Soccer standings just one season ago, and their biggest supporters boycotted certain matches to protest a decade of poor performance.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Oklahoma State coach Mike Gundy agrees to restructured contract after 3-9 season
item.description: Mike Gundy is coming back. Oklahoma State announced Saturday that its longtime football coach agreed to a new deal. The restructuring comes after the Cowboys, among the preseason favorites in the Big 12, finished with a disappointing 3-9 record.
item.dc:creator: CLIFF BRUNT, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Willy Adames agrees to $182 million, 7-year deal with the Giants, AP source says
item.description: Willy Adames has agreed to a $182 million, seven-year contract with San Francisco, providing the Giants with a power-hitting shortstop in the prime of his career, according to a person familiar with the negotiations.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Stanford, Maxime Raynaud too much for Cal as Cardinal win on road
item.description: In first game between teams as ACC members, Stanford holds off Cal's late rally to win conference game.
item.dc:creator: Justice delos Santos, The Mercury News

item.title: Georgia quarterback Carson Beck leaves SEC championship with injury
item.description: Georgia quarterback Carson Beck left Saturday's SEC championship game against Texas after taking a hard hit on the final play of the first half.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Georgia QB Carson Beck returns from hand injury for final snap in SEC championship OT win over Texas
item.description: Georgia quarterback Carson Beck, believed to be out for the remainder of the game with a hand injury, returned for the final snap in the Bulldogs’ 22-19 overtime victory over Texas in the Southeastern Conference championship game.
item.dc:creator: Charles Odum, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: No. 16 Iowa State falls short in Big 12 title game again, this time with CFP at stake
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — The stakes were higher for Iowa State, and the outcome was the same as the first for the Cyclones in their second trip to the Big 12 championship game. And the 112-year wait for a conference title will go on. No.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NFL closes probe of latest Deshaun Watson sexual assault allegations without discipline
item.description: An NFL spokesperson said the investigation into the most recent sexual assault allegations against Browns QB Deshaun Watson is now considered closed.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Man City drops more points after draw with Crystal Palace and Man United loses again
item.description: Manchester City’s Premier League title defense took another blow after drawing with Crystal Palace 2-2 on Saturday. Four-time defending champion City ended a seven-game winless run on Wednesday by beating Nottingham Forest, but dropped more points with the draw at Selhurst Park.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NorCal football: Why this was greatest night in short history of regional championships
item.description: From Pittsburg's amazing comeback against Folsom to gut-wrenching losses by St. Francis, Acalanes, this night will be remembered for quite some time.
item.dc:creator: Darren Sabedra, The Mercury News

item.title: Heisman hopeful Ashton Jeanty points to his faith after playoff-bound Boise State wins Mountain West title
item.description: Boise State star Ashton Jeanty spoke about his faith after the Broncos secured their place in the College Football Playoffs with a win over UNLV in the Mountain West tile game on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Chicago hosts conference rival Philadelphia
item.description: Philadelphia 76ers (6-15, 13th in the Eastern Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (10-14, 10th in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Sunday, 1 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: Nikola Vucevic and the Chicago Bulls take on Tyrese Maxey and the Philadelphia 76ers on Sunday. The Bulls are 8-7 in Eastern Conference games.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Jazz cruise to rare blowout win over Portland, 141-99
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - In what has been an extremely difficult rebuilding year, the Utah Jazz will relish nights like this one.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: No. 10 Boise State grabs CFP spot, beating No. 19 UNLV 21-7 in Mountain West championship
item.description: BOISE, Idaho (AP) — Ashton Jeanty ran for 209 yards and a touchdown and No. 10 Boise State earned a College Football Playoff spot, beating No. 19 UNLV 21-7 on Friday night for its second straight Mountain West title. Boise State (12-1, No.
item.dc:creator: JASON CHATRAW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jacob Trouba isn't pleased with the Rangers' handling of his departure in a trade with Anaheim
item.description: ANAHEIM, Calif. (AP) — Jacob Trouba is finally out of New York after months of public trade rumors and private threats from the Rangers, who were determined to get rid of their captain and his massive contract.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: SafeSport Center changes targeted in new bill aimed at sex abuse in sports
item.description: Four members of Congress unveiled a bipartisan bill Friday that would spark changes at the U.S. Center for SafeSport, placing a time limit on resolving cases that can sometimes take years and improving communication between the center and abuse survivors.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: High school facing student uprising over ban of shirts protesting trans athletes after girls beg for safety
item.description: Students at Martin Luther King High School in Riverside, California, are said to be planning weekly defiance against the school for rules preventing anti-trans shirts.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jets take on the Blackhawks Saturday following overtime win
item.description: Winnipeg Jets (19-8, in the Central Division) vs. Chicago Blackhawks (8-16-2, in the Central Division) Chicago; Saturday, 4 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: The Winnipeg Jets visit the Chicago Blackhawks after the Jets defeated the Buffalo Sabres 3-2 in overtime.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Jazz commit 29 turnovers in 133-106 loss to OKC
item.description: OKLAHOMA CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Jazz lead the NBA in turnovers, and Tuesday night was their worst night yet. Utah committed a season-high 29 turnovers, 19 in the first half, as the Jazz go 0-4 in NBA Cup games with a 133-106 blowout loss at Oklahoma City.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
